description_for_human: Interactive sample app for DATPAQ WHOIS lookups.
description_for_model: Use this sample app to demonstrate DATPAQ WHOIS requests. It sends GET requests to https://datpaq.com/api/v1/whois/lookup with a required domain query parameter and a runtime user-supplied API key. The shared client sends x-api-key, and the app mirrors the same runtime value into api_key for curl-style WHOIS route compatibility. The UI validates required input, exposes copyable request URLs and JSON responses, and renders empty, loading, error, partial, and success states.

query_parameters.name: domain
query_parameters.description: One domain or a comma-separated batch of domains.

query_parameters.name: api_key
query_parameters.description: Compatibility query parameter derived from the user-entered API key.
